title: ruta chalepensis var. attenuata
intro: Ruta chalepensis var. attenuata, also known as Rue or Garden Rue, is a flowering plant species within the rutaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits associated with Ruta chalepensis var. attenuata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of this plant often include tea infusions, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
